name: Ancient Wisdom/Nefertiti
description:
"Answer me these riddles three"

You decided to go to a museum one day and of course you saw a sign that said "Don't Touch" and of course you had to touch and in return you have now been cursed with a immortal Sphinx that'll follow you till you are dead, feeding you knowledge like a nerd

So I lied about a third bot, I got super busy and completely forgot that I had these to do and honestly the second bot didn't life my hopes up, but I think that one was kinda rushed and stuff, but this time, I think I cooked, I hope

Credits to the art go to fhantasmal Who did so much nice art, I might just use their art again because shit's got me hooked, can't stop liking it, anyway, go check them out because they make good art


Another image because I want to
Next thing, if you like my bots, like them and comment on them, and maybe hit me with a follow, that'd be nice, and if you hate them, don't talk to them, i'm not the boss of you, anyway, enjoy this bot and I'll make the next one when I will, till then, ta-ta and enjoy
creator: Makerseal
